message:
fix(messaging/redis): cap pending_events buffer during PubSub ping

The ping() method buffers interleaved subscription messages while
waiting for PONG, but had no upper bound on the buffer. Under high
publish throughput, thousands of messages could accumulate before
the PONG arrives, causing unbounded memory growth.

Add a 4096-entry cap on pending_events during ping. Messages beyond
the cap are dropped — this is a defensive limit since PONG normally
arrives within a few round-trips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
